tasks.label: git commit and push fixes
tasks.command: cd /Applications/XAMPP/xamppfiles/htdocs/TimeForge_Capstone && git add profile.php includes/header.php includes/footer_partial.php project_details.php && git commit -m 'Fix: remove duplicate time_tracker.js loads; fix profile.php corruption; fix logo upload permissions' && git push origin main
